entry.title: MR11 change layout (grid) is not working
entry.content:
I have an issue with MR11 transaction. I try to change the layout by bringing an extra field. When i hit check the layout breaks giving me an empty layout (3 screenshots)

After that whatever field i try to bring it just doesnt work. When i mark all of them only 3 are showing 

I also searched sap notes and googled it but nothing .

entry.title: Question Regarding Authorization Requirement for Finance Plan Import (BUKRS_GLRLDNR_CATEGORY_P)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We encountered the following authorization error when the customer attempted to import finance plan data:

Error Message: FINS_ACDOCP_PLANNING056
You do not have authorization to save planning data for source xx, category Z_FI_TAG00, controlling area Axxx, company code 00xx.
Please maintain authorization object K_ACDOCP_P.

As a workaround, we resolved the issue by changing the restriction of the customer's business role "BR_CORP_ADV" for:

Company Code / Ledger / Category (BUKRS_GLRLDNR_CATEGORY_P)
→ Set the entire restriction to Unrestricted (*) for all values

After setting the restriction type to unrestricted for all Company Code / Ledger / Category values, the finance plan import worked successfully.

Question

Does anyone know since when this unrestricted setting for all values of BUKRS_GLRLDNR_CATEGORY_P became required in order to import finance plan data?

Specifically:

  • Was this requirement introduced/changed in a particular version upgrade?
  • Or has this been standard SAP behavior for a long time?

We found a similar KBA dated 2025/11/18, so it appears this may not be related to 2602VUP.
However, we would like to understand when/why this authorization setup became necessary.

Any insight would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another
entry.content: Accounting may need to transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another.  How would they accomplish that?

entry.title: About the successor features to KAK2
entry.content:
We learned from the Readiness Check that KAK2 is a function that will be discontinued when upgrading to 2025 FPS01.

Although SAP Note 3212819 was listed as a related note, we could not find any relevant information when searching for it in the New Features Viewer.

With the discontinuation of KAK2, is there any successor functionality available?
Or is the overall SAP direction to no longer support mass updates of Statistical Key Figures, meaning that no successor function exists?

Additionally, it appears that the function itself is still usable in 2025 FPS01. Could you please clarify whether it will remain available in this version, or if it will become unavailable after a certain period

entry.title: Need to activate mid month deprecation after go-live
entry.content:
We want to activate mid month depreciation config in middle of the year after go-live.

Please suggest and guide us ho we can do this?

entry.title: Prenotification (Test Bank Transfer)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are able to successfully generate ACH prenotification runs and view the
associated “List of Changed Bank Data.”

However, we need clarification on the payment medium output:

1. Where is the ACH prenotification (NACHA) file stored after generation
   (logical file path / physical directory on the application server)?

2. Which standard configuration determines the file path and filename?

3. Is it standard SAP behavior that the ACH formatted file is not displayed
   on the prenotification screens and is only available as a physical file
   (e.g. via AL11 / application logs)?

Requesting confirmation of standard SAP behavior and documentation reference.

Regards,

Rishi

entry.title: Co-Product Cost Estimate Not Matching Apportionment Structure Percentage in Plant P001
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

While running the standard cost estimate for the header material 31000001 and co-product material 31000005 in plant P001, the cost estimate is not being calculated according to the apportionment structure percentage maintained in the header material.

Expected Cost Distribution (Total Cost: 320):

  • 31000001 – 60% → 192
  • 31000005 – 40% → 128

System Calculated Values:

  • 31000001 → 184.00
  • 31000005 → 136.00

The system is not distributing the costs as per the defined apportionment structure percentages.

For your reference I have attached step by step how to reproduce the issue.

 

System: DEV 110 Test system.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mastan Shaik

entry.title: F110_Vendor Debit line items not pick up in Payment proposal
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

While processing the vendor payment through F110, system does not picking the vendor debit line items in payment proposal.

I have attached the document with details of the issue and test case.

Regards, 

Venkatesh

entry.title: BAPI/FM/API for KKPAN in SAP S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are not able to find the suitable BAPI/Function Module/API for the transaction "KKPAN" to create a program to perform the unit costing for mass materials.

Kindly check and help us to provide the requested information.

Best Regards..!! 

Linga swamy

entry.title: How to update code page in payment medium format
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good day!!

We would like to know where and how to update code page value (4110) for Payment medium format(Table - TFPM042FFC). Please let us know and find the attached screenshot from CHD system - client 200 sysem where we have mainted via debug mode your reference. Same value we have to maintain in CHD system and client 100 

Thank you,

V.Sudharsana rao.

entry.title: Change of Controlling Area for a LIVE company code.
entry.content:
Hi 

We have a live company code with company code currency as OMR our controlling area currency is INR. It is now giving us errors in reporting mainly for WBS budgeting. 

Now our business has proposed to change the controlling area for this company code; please let us know the steps and the impact analysis which we should refer for this change as we understand this is a massive impact change.

entry.title: FB03 - PAYMENT USAGE
entry.content:
Currently, due to system performance client users do not have access to FBL5N. How can I configure the FB03 ''payment usage''to drill down into the data in FBL5H?

Error - “You are not authorized to call up line item display”
Message No. MSITEM037

entry.title: how to do batch revaluation
entry.content:
We are using batch specific UOM. So 1 EA = 20 L. So if we receive 20 L of product we get 20L and 1EA in MMBE of product.
For example if i receive 10 L and put batch character as 20 I will get below

If I recieve extra 2L quantity i will get 0.6 EA

Now if I want to do change the batch character in MSC2N i am getting a error

In Normal case it will allow to change this and an additional posting will happen.
Is changing the character value in MSC2n is batch revaluation or do we have seperate transaction to do this?

entry.title: CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO returns empty data after upgrade to S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
Description:
After upgrading S/4HANA On-Premise from 1809 to 2025, part of our custom code no longer works.

We are using CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO to capture ALV output from a standard report. The logic worked correctly in 1809.

Simplified code:

cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set(
display = abap_false
metadata = abap_false
data = abap_true ).

SUBMIT fagl_line_item_browser
VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
AND RETURN.

TRY.
cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
IMPORTING r_data = lt_data_ref ).
CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info.
MESSAGE 'Error when receiving data.' TYPE 'E'.
ENDTRY.

After the upgrade, lt_data_ref is always initial (empty), although the report itself displays data correctly when executed normally.

It seems that FAGL_LINE_ITEM_BROWSER might now be using ALV with IDA (HANA-based rendering) instead of classical SALV, which could explain why CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO no longer captures the output data.

Has the behavior of CL_SALV_BS_RUNTIME_INFO changed in S/4HANA 2025, or is there a recommended alternative approach to retrieve ALV data from FAGL_LINE_ITEM_BROWSER in this case?

entry.title: S_ALR_87013336 dumps with SQL parser error after upgrade to S/4HANA 2025
entry.content:
After upgrading S/4HANA On-Premise from 1809 to 2025, the standard report S_ALR_87013336 produces an SQL error at runtime.

Error message:
“SQL Error: The parser produced the error: The elements in the …”
(Message No. GU016)

The report was working correctly before the upgrade (in 1809) and no custom modifications were made.

Is this a known issue with S_ALR_87013336 after upgrading to S/4HANA 2025?
Are there any SAP Notes or recommended corrections (e.g., regeneration of report groups or fixes in Report Painter/Writer)?

entry.title: Credit card transaction history
entry.content: Hi, Which transaction on SAP can we use to view concur credit card postings against a cost centre with the supporting documentation.

How to Disable payment medium workbench check box with company code and payment method wise

Charan

entry.title: Error to change BA in asset master data
entry.content: Please be advised that the Business Area within the Asset Master Data will be updated using transaction AS02. This change will be implemented by creating a new time-dependent interval to preserve the historical audit trail for the existing asset.

entry.title: Assigning fixed assets to functional location
entry.content: How do I assign a fixed asset to a functional location?  Am I able to assign more than one asset to the same functional location?

entry.title: PSMASSCREATE_PROJ text-105 nur in Englisch vorhanden
entry.content: Der Text-105 im Standardprogramm PSMASSCREATE_PROJ ist nur auf Englisch verfügbar nicht auf Deutsch. System QS/4 100
